prompt: Find me the best recent YouTube videos about home espresso machines for beginners.

assertions.text: Output includes all 7 required fields (title, channel, subscriber count, view count, duration, upload date, URL)
Includes a views-to-subscribers engagement ratio for each video
Results are filtered to roughly the last 6 months (default window)
Has visual dividers between each result
Numbers are human-readable (e.g. 1.2M, 340K) rather than raw integers
Returns multiple results (up to 20) rather than just one or two
